# Investing {.unnumbered}

<br>

[**Savings**](savings.qmd) keep your purchasing power intact; investing
[grows]{style="color:#48a56a; font-weight: bold;"} it. This part covers the core ideas: compounding,
diversification, low-cost index funds, and the right account types to hold
them in.

Investing is the fourth and final lever from the
[Foundations](foundations.qmd). It assumes the previous levers are working:
income is coming in, spending is under control, and savings are
accumulating somewhere they can be moved into the market.

The aim is a portfolio you can leave alone for decades.
